title: Silky British Cranberry Soup
description: A floral, silky, comforting British dish featuring cranberry juice, simmer, sugar‑free‑friendly.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add onion, celery and apple; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in cranberries and cook until they begin to burst, about 2 minutes.
Pour in cranberry juice and vegetable broth, bring to a gentle simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes to meld the flavors.
Remove from heat, cool slightly, then puree the soup with an immersion blender until silky smooth.
Return the soup to low heat, stir in heavy cream, and warm through.
Season with salt, pepper, thyme and lemon zest, adjusting to taste.
Serve hot, optionally garnishing with a swirl of cream and a sprig of thyme.
